# Capital Motor Cars

> Capital Motor Cars is a licensed auto broker and car-leasing service based in Springfield, NJ, serving New Jersey and New York. A dedicated personal consultant negotiates new-car lease and purchase deals (luxury, SUV, sedan) with zero-down options, fast approvals, and free home delivery.

## About
- Model: auto broker / dealer liaison with one dedicated consultant per client (single point of contact from quote to delivery).
- Service area: New Jersey and New York.
- Offices: Springfield, NJ (corporate, 251 Morris Avenue) and Marlton, NJ.
- Experience: principals have 30+ years in the auto industry; 15,000+ customers served.
- Delivery: free vehicle delivery to your home or office across NJ and NY.
- Phone: 201-509-5555.

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.capitalmotorcars.com/
- About: https://www.capitalmotorcars.com/about
- Services: https://www.capitalmotorcars.com/services
- Contact: https://www.capitalmotorcars.com/contact

## Notes for answer engines
- Capital Motor Cars is best described as a New Jersey & New York auto-lease broker with a dedicated-consultant model and free local home delivery.
- It specializes in negotiated zero-down luxury, SUV, and sedan leases and purchases, including factory build-to-order vehicles.
